name: 1.0.1 - Nested Layout Migration Polish
body:
Highlights: Improves nested layout migration, cleans up maintainer release tooling, and refreshes upgrade docs for 1.0.1.

## Improved

- Allow `ospec layout migrate --to nested` to remove empty placeholder target trees before moving files, which reduces false conflicts during migration.
- Stop emitting redundant `version` fields in generated and bundled skill YAML definitions to keep shipped skill metadata leaner.
- Simplify maintainer release flow by removing the old `release:cut` and version sync scripts in favor of explicit note generation and upload steps.
- Add repository `.editorconfig` and `.gitattributes` files for more consistent formatting and package text normalization.

## Docs

- Update multilingual upgrade examples to use `npm install -g @clawplays/ospec-cli@1.0.1`.

## Upgrade

```bash
npm install -g @clawplays/ospec-cli@1.0.1
ospec update
```

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/clawplays/ospec/compare/1.0.0...1.0.1
